Neechal>hanga Raja Yoga of Mars
In the hierarchy of planets Mars exerts his special influence upon
the in habitants of the earth due to his proximity to the latter. During
his transit through the zodiac belt he starts from his own house in Aries
(positive sign). attains debilitation (Neeeha) in cancer 2s•. traverses to
his own house in Scorpio (negative sign). moves to his exaltation CUCflha)
capricorn 28•. Similarly. other planets have their points of debilitation
and exalation. But Neechabhanga R.aja Y09a of Mars is of paramount
i'lterest to astrol09ers because of its efficacy in transmitting its influence
at an alarming rate to the native. Effort is made here to study this Yoga
of Mars iB all its relation with other planets.
